title: AgentManager
excerpt: Never miss a Claude Code prompt. A floating macOS window for your sessions.
content_html:
for Claude Code · macOS

Your Claude sessions,
always in view.

A floating macOS window for every Claude Code session. The moment one needs input, it surfaces. When all is clear, it hides.

↓ Download App Available on macOS — open this page on your Mac to download

No credit card required

AgentManager

Waiting

Done

Running

Idle

Running multiple sessions? You won’t notice which one is waiting until it’s too late. AgentManager fixes that.

Features

See what's waiting

Every session's status at a glance — which is running, which needs you, which is done — and how long each has been that way.

Surfaces when you need it

Appears the moment any session needs input. Hides when everything is clear.

Jump to the right terminal

Click any row to jump straight to that session — the exact pane in iTerm2, the right tab in Terminal and Ghostty, the project window in your IDE.

Keyboard first

Toggle the window with ⌥ Space (customizable). Navigate sessions and jump to terminals — all without the mouse.

Works inside your IDE

Sessions launched from the integrated terminal of Android Studio, VS Code, Cursor and more show up in the list too — click to jump to that project's window.

Status in your menu bar

Without opening the window, the menu-bar icon shows counts by status as colored dots — so you always know how many sessions are waiting.

Cat sound alerts

A cat meow plays the moment a session needs your input. You'll hear it even when you're looking away. Prefer quiet? Mute it anytime in Settings — no Notification Center spam either way.

Pixel-art cat room

A cat wanders the room in sync with your sessions. The scene shifts between day and night.

Simple mode

Hide the cat and room decorations for a minimal, list-only view. Keyboard navigation and jump-to-terminal keep working just the same.

Pricing

placeholder

Free Trial

$ 0

7 days · no card required

  • All features unlocked
  • Unlimited sessions
  • Paid plan required after 7 days

Start free trial

placeholder

Monthly

$ 4 .99

per month, billed monthly

  • All features unlocked
  • Unlimited sessions
  • Cancel anytime

Start monthly plan

▸ ~2 MONTHS FREE

Annual

$ 4 .00

per month · $48 billed annually

  • All features unlocked
  • Unlimited sessions
  • Cancel anytime
  • ~20% off vs monthly

Start annual plan

Secure checkout by Freemius

Setup

  1. 01

    Start trial & install Click 7-day free trial — no card needed. Download the app, open it, drag AgentManager to Applications. Your license key arrives by email.

  2. 02

    Activate your license Open AgentManager, go to Settings → License, paste your key and click Activate.

  3. 03

    Run Claude Code Start any claude session. AgentManager detects it automatically. That's it.

FAQ

  • What are the system requirements?

    macOS 13 Ventura or later, on Apple Silicon or Intel. Claude Code (claude CLI) must be installed.

  • Which terminals and IDEs are supported?

    Detection works in any terminal — it's powered by Claude Code hooks. What differs is how precisely a click can jump:

    Host Jump precision

    iTerm2 Pane

    Terminal Tab

    Ghostty 1.3+ Tab / Pane

    VS Code · Cursor · Zed Window

    Android Studio · JetBrains IDEs Window

    Warp · kitty · WezTerm · Alacritty App

    tmux Detect only

    tmux sessions are detected and tracked, but jump is not supported yet.

  • Which macOS permissions does it need?

    Session detection needs no special permissions. Jumping depends on the destination: Automation permission for iTerm2 / Terminal / Ghostty (a dialog appears on your first jump — just click Allow), Accessibility for Android Studio and similar IDEs, and nothing at all for VS Code, Cursor, Zed, Warp, kitty, WezTerm, and Alacritty.

  • How does AgentManager detect sessions?

    AgentManager uses Claude Code hooks to detect sessions. During onboarding, a hook is registered automatically in ~/.claude/settings.json (a .bak backup is created first) — after that, every claude session you start appears in the list with no further setup. Sessions running subagents stay marked as running until the last subagent finishes.

  • Where does my session data go?

    Your session data — prompts, file paths, session names — never leaves your Mac. AgentManager sends only anonymized crash reports and usage statistics, and even those never include paths, session names, or license keys.

  • Is there a free trial? How is pricing structured?

    Yes — a 7-day free trial with all features unlocked, no credit card required. After the trial: Monthly at $4.99/mo, or Annual at $48/yr (~2 months free).

  • How many Macs can I use one license on?

    There is no limit on the number of Macs per license. Install and activate AgentManager on as many machines as you like. Each Mac is activated individually, and you can deactivate a device anytime from Settings → License.

  • How do updates work? Is the app safe?

    Updates are delivered automatically in-app — each one is cryptographically verified before install. The app itself is notarized by Apple.

• 01

• Which macOS permissions does it need?

    Session detection needs no special permissions. Jumping depends on the destination: Automation permission for iTerm2 / Terminal / Ghostty (a dialog appears on your first jump — just click Allow), Accessibility for Android Studio and similar IDEs, and nothing at all for VS Code, Cursor, Zed, Warp, kitty, WezTerm, and Alacritty.

sentences.zh: 它需要哪些 macOS 权限？

sentences.en: Session detection needs no special permissions.
sentences.zh: 会话检测不需要特殊权限。

blocks.html_en:
• How does AgentManager detect sessions?

    AgentManager uses Claude Code hooks to detect sessions. During onboarding, a hook is registered automatically in ~/.claude/settings.json (a .bak backup is created first) — after that, every claude session you start appears in the list with no further setup. Sessions running subagents stay marked as running until the last subagent finishes.

sentences.en: How does AgentManager detect sessions?
sentences.zh: AgentManager 如何检测会话？

sentences.en: AgentManager uses Claude Code hooks to detect sessions.
sentences.zh: AgentManager 使用 Claude Code 挂钩来检测会话。

sentences.en: During onboarding, a hook is registered automatically in ~/.claude/settings.json (a .bak backup is created first) — after that, every claude session you start appears in the list with no further setup.
sentences.zh: 在加入过程中，会在 ~/.claude/settings.json 中自动注册一个钩子（首先创建 .bak 备份）——之后，您启动的每个 claude 会话都会出现在列表中，无需进一步设置。

sentences.en: Sessions running subagents stay marked as running until the last subagent finishes.
sentences.zh: 运行子代理的会话将保持标记为正在运行，直到最后一个子代理完成。

blocks.html_en:
• Where does my session data go?

    Your session data — prompts, file paths, session names — never leaves your Mac. AgentManager sends only anonymized crash reports and usage statistics, and even those never include paths, session names, or license keys.

sentences.en: Where does my session data go?
sentences.zh: 我的会话数据去了哪里？

sentences.en: Your session data — prompts, file paths, session names — never leaves your Mac.
sentences.zh: 您的会话数据（提示、文件路径、会话名称）永远不会离开您的 Mac。

sentences.en: AgentManager sends only anonymized crash reports and usage statistics, and even those never include paths, session names, or license keys.
sentences.zh: AgentManager 仅发送匿名崩溃报告和使用统计信息，甚至这些报告也不包含路径、会话名称或许可证密钥。

blocks.html_en:
• Is there a free trial? How is pricing structured?

    Yes — a 7-day free trial with all features unlocked, no credit card required. After the trial: Monthly at $4.99/mo, or Annual at $48/yr (~2 months free).

sentences.en: Yes — a 7-day free trial with all features unlocked, no credit card required.

blocks.html_en:
• How many Macs can I use one license on?

    There is no limit on the number of Macs per license. Install and activate AgentManager on as many machines as you like. Each Mac is activated individually, and you can deactivate a device anytime from Settings → License.

sentences.en: How many Macs can I use one license on?
sentences.zh: 一份许可证可以在多少台 Mac 上使用？

sentences.zh: 每个许可证的 Mac 数量没有限制。

sentences.en: Install and activate AgentManager on as many machines as you like.
sentences.zh: 在您喜欢的任意多台计算机上安装并激活 AgentManager。

sentences.en: Each Mac is activated individually, and you can deactivate a device anytime from Settings → License.
sentences.zh: 每台 Mac 均单独激活，您可以随时从“设置”→“许可证”停用设备。

blocks.html_en:
• How do updates work? Is the app safe?

    Updates are delivered automatically in-app — each one is cryptographically verified before install. The app itself is notarized by Apple.

sentences.en: How do updates work?
sentences.zh: 更新如何进行？

sentences.en: Is the app safe?
sentences.zh: 该应用程序安全吗？

sentences.en: Updates are delivered automatically in-app — each one is cryptographically verified before install.
sentences.zh: 更新会在应用程序内自动交付 - 每一项更新都会在安装前进行加密验证。

sentences.en: The app itself is notarized by Apple.
sentences.zh: 该应用程序本身经过 Apple 公证。

content_html_zh:
适用于克劳德·代码 · macOS

您的克劳德会议，始终可见。

每个 Claude Code 会话都有一个浮动 macOS 窗口。 当人们需要输入的那一刻，它就会浮现出来。 当一切都清楚的时候，它就隐藏起来了。

↓ 下载 macOS 上可用的应用程序 — 在 Mac 上打开此页面进行下载

无需信用卡

代理管理器

等待

Done

跑步

Idle

运行多个会话？ 你不会注意到哪一个在等待，直到为时已晚。 AgentManager 修复了这个问题。

特征

看看有什么在等待

每个会话的状态一目了然 - 哪个正在运行、哪个需要您、哪个已完成 - 以及每个会话持续了多长时间。

当你需要的时候出现

在任何会话需要输入时出现。 当一切都清楚时隐藏。

跳转到正确的终端

单击任意行可直接跳转到该会话 - iTerm2 中的确切窗格、Terminal 中的右侧选项卡和 Ghostty（IDE 中的项目窗口）。

键盘优先

使用 ⌥ Space（可自定义）切换窗口。 导航会话并跳转到终端——所有这些都无需鼠标。

在您的 IDE 中工作

从 Android Studio、VS Code、Cursor 等集成终端启动的会话也会显示在列表中 - 单击可跳转到该项目的窗口。

菜单栏中的状态

无需打开窗口，菜单栏图标就会按状态显示计数为彩色点 - 因此您始终知道有多少会话正在等待。

猫的声音警报

当会话需要您输入时，就会发出猫叫声。 即使您移开视线，您也会听到它的声音。 喜欢安静？ 随时在“设置”中将其静音 - 无论如何都不会收到通知中心垃圾邮件。

像素艺术猫房

一只猫与你的会话同步在房间里徘徊。 场景在白天和黑夜之间变换。

简单模式

隐藏猫和房间装饰以获得最小的仅列表视图。 键盘导航和跳转到终端保持不变。

定价

  • 所有功能已解锁
  • 无限次会话

每月 · 每年 48 美元

  • 无限次会话
  • 随时取消
  • 与每月相比约 20% 折扣

启动年度计划

Freemius 安全结帐

Setup

  1. 01 开始试用并安装 单击 7 天免费试用 — 无需卡。 下载应用程序，打开它，将 AgentManager 拖至应用程序。 您的许可证密钥通过电子邮件发送。
  2. 02 激活您的许可证 打开 AgentManager，转到“设置”→“许可证”，粘贴您的密钥并单击“激活”。
  3. 03 运行 Claude 代码 启动任何 claude 会话。 AgentManager 会自动检测它。 就是这样。

FAQ

  • 系统要求是什么？ macOS 13 Ventura 或更高版本，采用 Apple Silicon 或 Intel。 必须安装克劳德代码 (claude CLI)。
  • 支持哪些终端和 IDE？ 检测可以在任何终端上进行——它由 Claude Code hooks 提供支持。 不同之处在于点击跳转的精确程度： Host 跳转精度 iTerm2 Pane Terminal Tab Ghostty 1.3+ Tab / Pane VS Code · Cursor · Zed Window Android Studio · JetBrains IDEs Window Warp · kitty · WezTerm · Alacritty App tmux Detect 仅检测和跟踪 tmux 会话，但尚不支持跳转。
  • 它需要哪些 macOS 权限？ 会话检测不需要特殊权限。 跳转取决于目的地：iTerm2 / Terminal / Ghostty 的自动化权限（第一次跳转时会出现一个对话框 - 只需单击“允许”），Android Studio 和类似 IDE 的可访问性，VS Code、Cursor、Zed、Warp、kitty、WezTerm 和 Alacritty 则没有任何权限。
  • AgentManager 如何检测会话？ AgentManager 使用 Claude Code 挂钩来检测会话。 在加入过程中，会在 ~/.claude/settings.json 中自动注册一个钩子（首先创建 .bak 备份）——之后，您启动的每个 claude 会话都会出现在列表中，无需进一步设置。 运行子代理的会话将保持标记为正在运行，直到最后一个子代理完成。
  • 我的会话数据去了哪里？ 您的会话数据（提示、文件路径、会话名称）永远不会离开您的 Mac。 AgentManager 仅发送匿名崩溃报告和使用统计信息，甚至这些报告也不包含路径、会话名称或许可证密钥。
  • 有免费试用吗？ 定价结构如何？ 是的 — 7 天免费试用，解锁所有功能，无需信用卡。 试用后：每月 4.99 美元/月，或每年 48 美元/年（约 2 个月免费）。
  • 一份许可证可以在多少台 Mac 上使用？ 每个许可证的 Mac 数量没有限制。 在您喜欢的任意多台计算机上安装并激活 AgentManager。 每台 Mac 均单独激活，您可以随时从“设置”→“许可证”停用设备。
  • 更新如何进行？ 该应用程序安全吗？ 更新会在应用程序内自动交付 - 每一项更新都会在安装前进行加密验证。 该应用程序本身经过 Apple 公证。
